description: Episodic recall. A frontier quest: the player promises a smith star-metal, is betrayed by a guide in the mountains, and finds the ore. Distractors include keyword-traps (share words, not meaning) and vector-traps (share meaning, not words).

scenes.content: You arrived in the frontier town of Ironhollow as the snow began to fall, your father's shattered greatsword wrapped in oilcloth across your back.
Doran the blacksmith examined the broken blade by candlelight. 'Star-metal,' he muttered. 'Only star-metal could mend a sword like this.'
You looked Doran in the eye and gave your word: you would bring him the star-metal before the first thaw, no matter the cost.
The tavern that night was loud with miners' songs. You traded rumors of the high passes over watered ale.
On the climb you betrayed your own fear, forcing your legs up the icy ridge when every instinct screamed to turn back.
A grizzled guide named Kael offered to lead you through the Frostpeak range for a fistful of silver.
Doran's young apprentice promised to keep your room at the forge warm until you returned.
Halfway through the high pass, Kael turned on you — he had sold your route to the bandits who waited in the rocks.
You fought the bandits in the snow, breath ragged, until the last of them fled into the white.
Honoring the oath you had sworn at the forge, you pressed deeper into the peaks, refusing to return empty-handed.
Kael had led you astray and slipped away in the storm, taking half your supplies with him.
Deep in the abandoned Frostpeak mines you found it at last: a vein of star-metal glinting silver-blue in the dark.
You carried the star-metal back down the mountain, your debt to Doran finally within reach.

queries.query: what did I promise the smith
queries.notes: s003 = the explicit promise; s010 = honoring the oath (vector-trap, no 'promise'/'smith'). s007 (apprentice promised) is a keyword-trap distractor.

queries.query: who betrayed us in the mountains
queries.notes: s008 = Kael's betrayal; s011 = restatement (vector-trap, no 'betray'). s005 ('betrayed your own fear') is a keyword-trap distractor.

queries.query: where did we find the star-metal ore
queries.notes: s012 = the find in the Frostpeak mines.
